title: Outdoor Retail Software | Inventory, Point of Sale & eCommerce

headers.text: Gear Up for Success in Outdoor Sports with Coreware

Running a retail store in the outdoor sports industry involves juggling inventory, sales, and customer relationships. Coreware streamlines your operations, optimizes inventory management, and ensures every customer receives exceptional service. Whether in-store or online, we help you create a seamless shopping experience that keeps customers coming back.
Why Choose Coreware for Your Retail Store?
Simplify daily operations and increase store performance so you can focus on growing your business.
Deliver personalized service that turns first-time shoppers into loyal customers.
Connect your in-store and online operations for a unified, efficient retail experience.
Easily track stock levels, automate reorders, and avoid stockouts with real-time inventory updates.
Enjoy fast, secure transactions with a user-friendly Point-of-Sale system that seamlessly integrates with your inventory.
Strengthen customer relationships through personalized marketing campaigns and excellent service, boosting customer retention.
Manage online and in-store sales channels with synchronized inventory and a seamless online shopping experience.
Access detailed analytics to track sales performance, monitor inventory, and make informed business decisions.
Conduct full or partial counts for outdoor gear, clothing, and equipment, with email alerts for low stock levels.
Auto-generate purchase orders and email suppliers, ensuring timely restocking of essential items.
Add and manage new store locations as your outdoor sports business grows.
Manage product options like size, color, and style for efficient inventory and sales tracking.
Offer outdoor gear, apparel, and equipment through a mobile-friendly platform, letting customers shop anytime.
Keep online and in-store stock updated to prevent overselling and maintain accurate inventory.
Set custom prices for retail shoppers, bulk buyers, or promotions to boost sales.
Set shipping rates based on the size and weight of products to ensure accurate charges and timely deliveries.
Send targeted emails and texts to showcase seasonal products, sales, or new arrivals, keeping customers informed and engaged.
Segment customers by buying habits to send tailored promotions, driving sales and customer loyalty.
Stay on top of customer reviews and respond quickly to maintain a positive online presence.
Schedule and manage posts across Facebook, Instagram, and Google My Business from one app, and handle all customer messages in a single place for better communication and stronger relationships.
Accept all major payment methods, including credit cards, debit cards, and mobile payments, giving customers more ways to pay for outdoor gear and equipment.
Enjoy next-day deposits, keeping your cash flow steady for restocking and daily operations.
Protect customer data with secure payment processing, building confidence and trust in your business.
Ready to Take Your Outdoor Sports Retail Business to the Next Level?
OPERATE YOUR BUSINESS LIKE A BOSS

Easily track stock, manage new store locations, and automate orders to keep your outdoor sports store running efficiently. Stay on top of product details for better sales management.
Create a seamless online shopping experience, manage pricing and inventory, and ensure accurate shipping for all your outdoor gear and equipment.
Easily manage all your marketing efforts from one platform—promote new products, engage with customers, and strengthen your store’s reputation, all while saving time.
Coreware offers flexible payment options with fast access to funds, while ensuring secure, PCI-compliant transactions to build trust with your customers.
READY TO GIVE US A TRY?
See how our solutions can help you run your Home FFL business more efficiently and successfully!

            gunsmiths, pawn, CBD, and more.

Start using Coreware and take control of how your business
              operates.

Coreware streamlines your operations, optimizes inventory management, and ensures every customer receives exceptional service. Whether in-store or online, we help you create a seamless shopping experience that keeps customers coming back. Why Choose Coreware for Your Retail Store? Simplify daily operations and increase store performance so you can focus on growing your business. Deliver personalized service that turns first-time shoppers into loyal customers. Connect your in-store and online operations for a unified, efficient retail experience. Features Tailored for Outdoor Retailers Easily track stock levels, automate reorders, and avoid stockouts with real-time inventory updates.
